sourceAuthority: Victorian Office of the Chief Parliamentary Counsel

accessTerms.publicAccess: free public access to the Victorian legislation website
accessTerms.machineReadableAccess: no public machine-readable API or feed verified in this discovery pass
accessTerms.copyright: Victorian Government copyright and website terms apply

identifierCues: title and year displayed by the Victorian legislation website
versionCues: current and superseded versions in the in-force collection

adapterMapping.search: Not enabled; use official browse/search pages only after a machine-readable contract is verified.
adapterMapping.retrieval: Future adapter may retrieve authoritative PDF or HTML pages with format and authority labels.
adapterMapping.versioning: Use published version history, commencement, and superseded/repealed cues; do not infer versions from filenames alone.
adapterMapping.export: Unsupported until a source-backed parser and provenance-preserving export exists.
adapterMapping.provenance: Emit sourceAuthority, jurisdiction, source URL, format, authority status, and retrieval timestamp.
adapterMapping.unsupported: Return structured unsupported_provider_capability for runtime operations until tests and fixtures prove the adapter.

edgeCases: the website distinguishes Acts from statutory rules
repealed or revoked material is separate from in-force material
PDF and HTML representations may have different authority or convenience status
no public machine-readable API or feed was verified in this discovery pass
the Victoria Government Gazette is a separate official publication surface
fixturePolicy: metadata-only source-shape fixture; no legal text or fabricated records
